build_sh_sanitizer:
set -e
BUILD_DIR=tensorflow/lite/build-asan-tflite
if [ ! -f "$BUILD_DIR/libtensorflow-lite.a" ]; then
  mkdir -p "$BUILD_DIR"
  cd "$BUILD_DIR"
  ASAN_OPTIONS=use_sigaltstack=0 cmake ../ \
    -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++ \
    -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug \
    -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS='-fsanitize=address,undefined -g -O0' \
    -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS='-fsanitize=address,undefined -g -O0' \
    -DCMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS='-fsanitize=address,undefined' \
    -DCMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS='-fsanitize=address,undefined' \
    -DTFLITE_ENABLE_GPU=OFF -DTFLITE_ENABLE_RUY=ON \
    -DTFLITE_ENABLE_XNNPACK=OFF -DTFLITE_ENABLE_INSTALL=OFF
  ASAN_OPTIONS=use_sigaltstack=0 cmake --build . --target tensorflow-lite -j$(nproc)
  cd $OLDPWD
fi
mkdir -p build-asan-tflite-harness/bin
clang++ -fsanitize=address,undefined -g -O0 -std=c++17 \
  -I . \
  -I tensorflow/lite/build-asan-tflite/flatbuffers/include \
  -I tensorflow/lite/build-asan-tflite/_deps/flatbuffers-src/include \
  ${POC_DIR}/harness_tflite_load.cpp \
  tensorflow/lite/build-asan-tflite/libtensorflow-lite.a \
  tensorflow/lite/build-asan-tflite/_deps/flatbuffers-build/libflatbuffers.a \
  -ldl -lpthread \
  -o build-asan-tflite-harness/bin/harness_tflite_load
build_sh_cov: TODO: replicate the cmake configure with -fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping flags into a parallel build-cov-tflite directory; the harness link line then uses build-cov-tflite/libtensorflow-lite.a.
expected_fingerprint:
AddressSanitizer: heap-buffer-overflow
flatbuffers::ReadScalar
tflite::Model::buffers
ValidateModelBuffers
BuildFromAllocation
